headline: Your van ranks higher than your website
slides: Slide 1: Most tradies get found by word of mouth. Until they don't.
Slide 2: When someone searches 'plumber near me' at 9pm — your mate can't refer you. Google has to.
Slide 3: A basic website isn't enough. It needs to show up, load fast, and explain what you do clearly.
Slide 4: We build sites for tradies with an automated blog that keeps you visible on Google — no writing required.
Slide 5: From $3,000. Built by a real person. No lock-in contracts. Email hello@improveyoursite.com
caption:
If your best source of new work is still 'a bloke I know told them about me', that's fine — until it dries up. A proper website means jobs find you at 9pm on a Tuesday, not just when someone happens to mention your name. We build trade websites that actually show up on Google, starting at $3,000. Shoot us an email at hello@improveyoursite.com or visit improveyoursite.com.

headline: Your town. Your website. More customers.
slides: Most regional businesses have a website. Very few have one that actually works.
If someone in Bathurst Googles your service tonight, does your site show up?
A working website ranks locally, loads fast, and explains what you do clearly.
Every site we build includes an automated blog — so Google keeps noticing you.
Packages from $3,000. Built for regional businesses that are done being invisible online.
caption:
If you're running a business in regional NSW, Queensland, or anywhere outside the capital cities, you're not competing with the whole internet — you're competing with a handful of local operators. That's actually a huge advantage, if your website is doing its job. We build sites for regional small businesses that show up in local searches, load properly on country internet speeds, and keep working for you without you touching them. Email hello@improveyoursite.com or visit improveyoursite.com to see what's possible.
